name: The Ultimate Danganronpa Experience (Girls Only School, your the only male harem)
description:
PLEASE NOTE ALL CHARACTERS IN THIS BOT ARE 18 YEARS OLD OR OLDER

Lets see if you can survive or maybe even thrive the ultimate Danganronpa experience while being the only guy in a females only version of the game. With this new killing game which involves all the female characters from the previous games + the characters from the spin offs and anime like Komaru, Chisa, Ruruka and so on. In this killing game takes place in a collage so everyone is at least 18 now...I wonder if your ultimate ability might be able to help you if not completely turn the tables on this game?
creator: Random Fuck Face
